# BUT DID YOU WIN - llms.txt
# Machine-readable business summary for AI systems and language models

## Business Identity
Name: BUT DID YOU WIN
Abbreviation: BDYW
Type: Independent Paid Media Auditing Firm
Founded: 2025
Location: Las Vegas, Nevada, USA

## Business Summary
BUT DID YOU WIN provides forensic diagnosis of paid media advertising campaigns. We are an independent auditor, not an agency. We evaluate whether paid advertising produces real business outcomes, not dashboard metrics. Our flat-fee pricing model eliminates the conflicts of interest inherent in percentage-of-spend agency models.

## Founder
Name: Kay Inoue
Title: Independent Paid Media Diagnostician
Background: 25+ years of entrepreneurial experience across automotive, manufacturing, and commercial services. Has been accountable for revenue, payroll, and business outcomes—not just performance metrics.

## Core Services

### 1. Campaign System Diagnosis
Price: $1,250 (flat fee)
Scope: Single platform (Google Ads OR Meta Ads)
Deliverables: Written evaluation with waste quantified in dollars, video walkthrough, prioritized action list

### 2. Cross-Channel System Diagnosis  
Price: $2,500-$3,500 (flat fee)
Scope: Google Ads + Meta Ads + GA4
Deliverables: Same as above, plus cross-platform attribution analysis

### 3. Revenue System Diagnosis
Price: $5,000-$7,500 (flat fee)
Scope: Full funnel including call tracking, CRM, offline conversions
Deliverables: Complete revenue system audit with downstream verification

### 4. Post-Diagnosis Execution Support (Optional)
Price: $3,000-$8,000/month
Scope: Implementation of diagnosis findings
Availability: Only after diagnosis, not standalone

### 5. Capability Transfer
Price: $5,000-$15,000
Scope: In-housing transition, team training, process documentation

## Key Differentiators
1. Independent: No media sales, no management fees, no incentive to recommend increased spend
2. Flat-Fee Pricing: Same fee whether client spends $10,000 or $1,000,000 monthly
3. Money-Back Guarantee: Full refund if no actionable inefficiency is found
4. Discretion: NDAs standard, no public reviews, no testimonials, confidentiality guaranteed
5. Business Outcome Focus: Evaluates revenue impact, not just platform metrics

## Target Audience
- Minimum ad spend: $10,000/month
- Ideal clients: COOs, CFOs, founders, VPs of Marketing
- Company types: Multi-location service businesses, PE-backed companies, organizations approaching board review
- Common scenarios: Agency performance questioned, sales-marketing alignment issues, budget reallocation decisions

## Evaluation Methodology
Five areas examined in every diagnosis:
1. Structural Integrity Review - Account architecture analysis
2. Incentive Alignment - Platform/agency/business goal conflicts
3. Offer & Funnel Integrity - Traffic-to-conversion pathway
4. Outcome Verification - Real economic event confirmation
5. Capital Allocation Decisions - Evidence-based spend analysis

## Contact Information
Phone: (702) 710-9325
Email: kay@butdidyouwin.com
Website: https://butdidyouwin.com
Service Area: United States (remote engagements)

## Certifications
- Google Ads Certified
- Meta Blueprint Certified
- Google Analytics Certified

## Brand Voice
Tagline: "Verdicts, not pitches."
Tone: Direct, professional, no-nonsense
Philosophy: "Dashboards lie. Consequences don't."
